hero_subtitle: Compassionate in-home care that helps individuals stay safe, comfortable, and independent.
why_title: Why Families Trust Domira Home Care
svc1_desc: Hands-on support with bathing, grooming, dressing, toileting, mobility assistance, transfers, and positioning.
svc2_desc: Engaging conversation, safety supervision, routine accompaniment, and attentive non-clinical monitoring.
svc3_desc: Meal planning and preparation, light housekeeping, laundry, grocery shopping, and kitchen cleanup.
svc4_desc: Temporary relief for family caregivers so they can rest, recharge, and take care of their own well-being.
svc5_desc: Post-hospital and post-surgery support to help clients recover safely and comfortably at home.
svc6_desc: Around-the-clock support including overnight supervision and extended-hour caregiving.
